summary: Audio playback delay when switching to USB source

description.problem: When user selects USB as audio source, there is a noticeable delay before audio starts playing.
steps_to_reproduce: 2. Wait for home screen to appear
3. Insert USB drive with audio files
4. Tap on USB source in media menu
description.expected_result: Audio should start playing within 200ms of source selection (as per KPI requirement)
description.actual_result: Audio takes approximately 500-550ms to start playing. User perceives system as slow/laggy.

summary: Bluetooth call disconnects after few minutes

description.problem: During hands-free phone call via Bluetooth, the connection drops unexpectedly and call audio switches to phone speaker.
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Pair phone with infotainment via Bluetooth
2. Initiate or receive a phone call
description.expected_result: Bluetooth connection should remain stable throughout the entire phone call duration.
description.actual_result: Call disconnects randomly between 5-15 minutes. User has to manually reconnect or continue on phone speaker.
description.frequency: Intermittent - occurs in approximately 3 out of 5 calls

summary: System boot time increased significantly in latest build

description.problem: After updating to latest software build, the system takes much longer to boot compared to previous version.
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Power off the system completely (ignition off)
4. Measure time until home screen is displayed
description.expected_result: System should boot and display home screen within 3 seconds (as per boot KPI requirement).
description.actual_result: System takes approximately 4.2 seconds to boot. This is a regression from previous build which booted in 2.8 seconds.

summary: System crashes after extended playback - suspected memory issue

description.problem: During extended audio playback (8+ hours), the media service crashes and restarts. System shows brief interruption in audio.
steps_to_reproduce: 2. Let system run continuously for 8-10 hours
description.expected_result: System should run stable indefinitely without any crashes or restarts.
description.actual_result: After approximately 8-9 hours, media service crashes. Audio stops momentarily and service restarts. User experiences brief audio interruption.

summary: Radio preset not restored after ignition cycle

description.problem: When user turns off vehicle and restarts, the previously selected radio preset is not restored. System defaults to first preset.
steps_to_reproduce: 3. Tune to preset 5 (or any preset other than 1)
description.expected_result: Radio should resume playing on preset 5 (the last selected preset).
description.actual_result: Radio resumes but on preset 1 (default). User has to manually select preferred preset again every time.

dlt_log_content:

summary: Bluetooth music does not resume after ignition restart

description.problem: When last audio source was Bluetooth streaming (A2DP), the music does not automatically resume after turning vehicle off and on again.
description.expected_result: Bluetooth should reconnect and music should resume automatically within a few seconds.
description.actual_result: System shows 'Connecting...' but eventually times out. No audio plays. User must manually select Bluetooth source or reconnect phone.

summary: Audio stops completely after several hours of use

description.problem: During extended audio playback with high system load, audio output stops completely. No audio from any source works until system restart.
description.expected_result: Audio should continue working indefinitely regardless of system load or duration.
description.actual_result: After approximately 6 hours, audio output stops completely. Screen shows playing but no audio. All sources affected. Requires system restart.
description.frequency: Reproducible in soak test with high load

summary: Music does not resume automatically after phone call ends

description.problem: When user is listening to music and receives a phone call, the music pauses correctly. However, after the call ends, music does not resume automatically.
steps_to_reproduce: 2. Make or receive a phone call via Bluetooth
3. Complete the call and hang up
description.expected_result: Music should automatically resume within 1-2 seconds after call ends.
description.actual_result: Music does not resume. Screen shows 'Paused' state. User must manually press play to resume music.

summary: Climate control display shows incorrect temperature

description.problem: The climate control temperature display on infotainment sometimes shows incorrect values or doesn't update when user changes temperature.
steps_to_reproduce: 2. Change temperature setting using physical controls
description.expected_result: Display should accurately show the current temperature setting immediately after change.
description.actual_result: Display occasionally shows wrong temperature or doesn't update. Approximately 15% of changes not reflected correctly.

summary: Audio takes too long to start from USB

description.problem: When switching to USB audio source, there is a noticeable delay before audio starts. Feels slower than previous software version.
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Insert USB drive with audio content
2. Wait for USB to be recognized
3. Tap USB source in media menu
4. Use stopwatch to measure time until audio plays
description.expected_result: Audio should start within 200ms of selecting USB source.
description.actual_result: Audio takes 350-400ms on average to start. This is noticeable to user and feels sluggish.
